---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for dipeen
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Is your request related to a specific frustration?
Example: "I always have to manually re-assign tasks when an agent goes offline..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you considered and why you ruled them out.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or references here. If this relates to an existing Phase in the roadmap (`docs/todo.md`), please mention it.
